user.title: Add a UniFi AP BLE proxy
user.description:
Add the public SSH key shown below to UniFi so this integration can log in.

**For the APs:** 
*UniFi Devices → Device Updates and Settings → Device SSH Authentication* 
enable it and add the key (it is pushed to your adopted APs).

**For the gateway (only if you need to use it as a jump host):** 
*Settings → Control Plane → Console* 
only lets you set an SSH password, so SSH into the console once with that password and append the key to `~/.ssh/authorized_keys` yourself.

Then enter the AP's address below — set the jump host to your gateway if Home Assistant can't reach the AP directly.

data.public_key: Public SSH key (read-only — copy this into UniFi)

error.cannot_connect: Could not tunnel in and reach bleconnd. Check SSH access, the key provisioning, and the jump host.
error.no_adapter: Connected, but the AP reported no BLE interface.
